text:
The Character Song Collection: Heavens Arena is a collection of songs sung by voice actors of the Hunter × Hunter 2011 anime. The third collection features the main characters of the Heavens Arena arc as well as the TV-size ending theme.

Track list

The Serious VS the Insane (Gon Freecss & Hisoka Morow) (sung by Megumi Han & Daisuke Namikawa)
Osu! Training  (Zushi feat. Wing) (sung by Yuka Terasaki & Toshihiko Seki)
One-on-One Match! -Electron Avalanche Remix-
Departure! - Killua version- (Killua Zoldyck) (sung by Mariya Ise)
Hunting For Your Dream (TV-size) (performed by GALNERYUS)
